name: Upscale Multi Service Colorado
description_short: Colorado-based multi-service financial firm offering credit repair, tax preparation, accounting, insurance, and notary services to individuals and small businesses.
description_long:
Upscale Multi Service Colorado is a locally-based financial services firm headquartered in Aurora, Colorado, with virtual service availability nationwide. The company positions itself as a full-service financial support provider combining tax, accounting, credit, and ancillary services under one roof. Founded on core values of trust, expertise, accuracy, and confidentiality, the firm targets individuals, families, and small business owners seeking integrated financial support.

The company's primary service offerings include tax preparation for individuals and small businesses with a stated Max Refund Guarantee, credit repair with dispute assistance and personalized action plans, professional accounting and bookkeeping services, insurance guidance and coverage options, and notary services for various document types. Their tax team claims an average of 10 years' experience, and they emphasize upfront transparent pricing with a No Surprise Guarantee model.

Upscale differentiates through service bundling—allowing clients to consolidate tax, credit, accounting, and insurance needs with a single provider—and through their Max Refund Guarantee on tax preparation. They also emphasize local Colorado presence combined with nationwide virtual availability, positioning themselves as accessible both regionally and remotely. Their marketing emphasizes personal care, clarity in communication, and reduction of financial stress.

However, the company's website provides limited operational transparency. No specific credentials, licensing numbers, licensing agency affiliations, or regulatory oversight information is disclosed for their credit repair services. Pricing details for individual services remain vague despite the "upfront transparent pricing" claim—actual costs require contacting the firm. The credit repair service description lacks specifics on dispute methodologies, success rates, timelines, or regulatory compliance details required under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA). As a multi-service generalist firm, specialization depth in credit repair compared to dedicated credit repair specialists remains unclear.
pros: Max Refund Guarantee on tax preparation—covers tax prep cost if another professional obtains larger refund with same information
Integrated multi-service platform allows consolidation of tax, credit, accounting, insurance, and notary services with single provider
Tax preparation team averages 10 years experience handling complex individual and business tax situations
No Surprise Guarantee with upfront transparent pricing for tax services
Nationwide virtual service availability combined with local Colorado presence and in-person office location
Personalized credit repair action plans with credit report review and dispute assistance included
Established local reputation—markets as 'trusted by individuals and families across Colorado'
cons: Website lacks specific CROA compliance information, licensing credentials, or regulatory oversight details for credit repair services
No disclosed pricing on individual services despite 'transparent pricing' claim—requires phone contact for quotes
Limited operational transparency on credit repair methodology, typical timelines, dispute success rates, or average credit score improvement results
Multi-service generalist model may lack specialized expertise compared to dedicated credit repair firms
No independent third-party reviews, testimonials, or performance metrics provided on website to validate claims
best_for: Colorado residents and small business owners seeking bundled tax preparation and credit repair from a single provider
Individuals with complex tax situations who also need credit dispute assistance and want integrated financial management
Small business owners requiring combined accounting, tax, and business credit services locally or via virtual consultation
diagnosis: Best for Colorado-based individuals and small business owners seeking integrated financial services who value service bundling and local accessibility. Primary caveat: limited transparency on credit repair credentials, CROA compliance, specific methodologies, and actual pricing—verification of licensing and regulatory standing is essential before engaging for credit repair services specifically.
services: Credit dispute assistance for inaccurate or outdated items
Notary services for legal, financial, and real estate documents
Secure document handling and confidential processing
